creator: keramida@ceid.upatras.gr
text:
Adding to audit trail...

The developers of Emacs have accepted the patch for the next pretest
build and pushed it to the bzr repository of Emacs.  So this can stay as
a local patch for editors/emacs (based on 23.1) until we have a new
Emacs release.  Then we can remove the local FreeBSD-specific patches.

Then we can start tracking the bzr trunk for emacs-devel.
